result.summary: Found 3 layout issues where content is being cut off or truncated at the edges, affecting navigation and game card display.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Games' displays as 'Hot Gam...' indicating horizontal overflow or insufficient container width
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width, reduce font size, or implement responsive design to ensure all navigation items are fully visible on the current viewport

issues.description: Game cards in 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section show truncated titles on the right side - cards appear to be cut off at the viewport edge (visible game names cut off like 'Magni...' and 'Mung...')
issues.suggestion: Implement proper overflow handling, adjust card width, or ensure horizontal scrolling is properly configured for the games carousel

issues.description: Game cards in 'Top Played New Games' section similarly show truncated content and cut-off cards on the right side (visible as 'Hyper...' and 'Dark...')
issues.suggestion: Apply consistent carousel/grid layout solution across all game sections with proper containment and scrolling behavior
